headline: Cencora (COR) Up 5.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Cencora (COR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Predict a 33.55% Upside in Cencora (COR): Here's  What You Should Know
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for Cencora (COR) points to a 33.6% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
